title: Thai Charred Shrimp Tagliere
description: A Thai-inspired appetizer featuring charred shrimp, creamy sauce, and crispy tagliere crackers.
instructions: 1. Preheat grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
2. Season shrimp with salt and pepper.
3. Grill shrimp for 2-3 minutes per side, until pink and charred.
4. Meanwhile, toast tagliere crackers in oven at 350°F for 5 minutes.
5. In a small bowl, whisk together lime juice, fish sauce, soy sauce, and honey.
6. Once shrimp are cooked, brush with charred red pepper and sprinkle with cilantro.
7. Serve with toasted tagliere crackers and creamy sauce for dipping.
8. Garnish with additional cilantro and lime wedges, if desired.
